education.degree: B.S. Applied and Computational Mathematical Sciences: Data Science and Statistics

research.title: The Effect of Washington's 2021 Capital Gains Tax on Wealth Migration
bullets: Estimated the causal effect of Washington's 7% capital gains tax on high-income out-migration in 2021
Built a synthetic control unit via a differences-in-differences design, matched on Washington's low-income migration pre-trends
Found statistically significant evidence, via permutation placebo test, of moderate high-income out-migration caused by the tax

research.title: TheoremGraph: Bridging Formal and Informal Mathematics
bullets: Built a database of 11.8 million mathematical theorems and their 18 million dependencies from informal sources

research.title: Semantic Search over 9 Million Mathematical Theorems
bullets: Built a semantic search engine over 9.2 million mathematical theorems using a vector embedding pipeline and AWS infrastructure
Accepted to the 2026 ICLR Workshop on LLM Reasoning

research.title: The Stability of Okun's Law Across Time and Space
bullets: Examined how Okun's Law changed in the U.S. across recession periods and states using 2005--2025 data with R
Found no evidence of coefficient heterogeneity across recession periods, and only weak evidence across states

research.title: So Long Solow? An Empirical Study of the Efficacy of Solow Growth Models
bullets: Analyzed how well the Mankiw-Romer-Weil Solow growth model captures economic dynamics of the U.S., Japan, and Germany from 1950--2023 with Python
Found that a SINDy-driven model outperformed those with constant or time-varying exogenous parameters

research.title: Statistics Directed Reading Program
research.organization: Department of Statistics, University of Washington
bullets: Studied econometric causal estimators under faculty mentorship, with emphasis on identification strategies and their theoretical foundations
Delivered a 15-minute presentation on the instrumental variables estimator applied to a job training program efficacy study

awards.title: Award for Outstanding Contribution in Mathematics
awards.organization: Math AI Lab, University of Washington

awards.title: Invitation to YC's 2026 AI Startup School

teaching.title: Lead Mathematics Tutor
bullets: Tutor Precalculus and Calculus I--III and lead a team of peer tutors at UW's drop-in math center
